'''Liquid Galaxies''' was a beverage which poured out of its bottle in thick droplets, each appearing to be a tiny [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] of [[Star/Legends|stars]]. In addition to its unique appearance, it was also supposed to taste great.

[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] once received a bottle of Liquid Galaxies after he and his surviving brother [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and sister [[Aeron Azzameen|Aeron]] narrowly evaded an [[Mission to Kessel Station|ambush]] orchestrated by his uncle, [[Antan Azzameen]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' data file containing the picture of "Liquid Galaxies" is named "SPICE.CBM," possibly indicating that the drink was meant to be an intoxicant, but the in-game description does not state this.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
